quote.text: You got to believe in yourself.
quote.author: Cathy Freeman

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before starting your homework.

quote.text: I think for me, it was always about the process and not the result.
quote.author: Ian Thorpe

micro_action.task: Eat one serving of green vegetables today.

quote.text: It’s about being the best version of myself.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Pack a healthy lunch for tomorrow.

quote.text: I don't look at my disability as a disadvantage. I look at it as a challenge that I've been able to overcome.
quote.author: Kurt Fearnley

micro_action.task: Do something kind for a teammate today.

quote.text: There is no such thing as failure, only feedback.
quote.author: Layne Beachley

micro_action.task: Say 'Please' when asking for something today.

quote.text: You just have to keep moving forward.
quote.author: Mick Fanning

micro_action.task: Drink 1.5 liters of water today.

quote.text: I love being part of a team. It’s what makes it special.
quote.author: Sam Kerr

micro_action.task: Cheer for your teammates during a drill.

quote.text: It’s about representing where you come from and who you are.
quote.author: Patty Mills

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit with breakfast.

quote.text: I just focus on my own lane.
quote.author: Ariarne Titmus

micro_action.task: Write down one thing you want to achieve in training today.

quote.text: It’s not how you start, it’s how you finish.
quote.author: Steve Waugh

micro_action.task: Do 10 minutes of extra practice on your own.

quote.text: You have to believe you can get anyone out.
quote.author: Glenn McGrath

micro_action.task: Use 'Thank you' every time someone helps you today.

quote.text: Just go out there and enjoy it.
quote.author: Adam Gilchrist

micro_action.task: Drink water instead of juice or soda today.

quote.text: I never gave up, even when it was hard.
quote.author: Sally Pearson

micro_action.task: Try a healthy new food today.

quote.text: I just want to jump as high as I can.
quote.author: Nicola Olyslagers

micro_action.task: Give a high-five to your opponent after a game or practice.

quote.text: I'm just a runner, but I hope I can inspire people.
quote.author: Peter Bol

micro_action.task: Drink 2 glasses of water after your workout.

quote.text: You have to put in the work if you want the results.
quote.author: Jessica Hull

micro_action.task: Eat an apple or banana as a snack.

quote.text: Success is more fun when you share it.
quote.author: Ellyse Perry

micro_action.task: Say something positive to a teammate who is struggling.

quote.text: Life is short, make it count.
quote.author: Dylan Alcott

micro_action.task: Say 'Thank you' to the officials or referees today.

quote.text: I just do what I need to do.
quote.author: Kaylee McKeown

micro_action.task: Drink water first thing when you wake up.

quote.text: It’s a long road, but it’s worth it.
quote.author: Cadel Evans

micro_action.task: Have 2 pieces of fruit today.

quote.text: It's about the comeback, not the setback.
quote.author: Geoff Huegill

micro_action.task: Help your parents with a chore at home without being asked.

quote.text: I just wanted to do my best for the team.
quote.author: Susie O'Neill

micro_action.task: Call out a teammate's good play today.

quote.text: I had to learn to love the sport again.
quote.author: Leisel Jones

micro_action.task: Drink 1.5 liters of water today.

quote.text: You have to be tough when things aren't going your way.
quote.author: Grant Hackett

micro_action.task: Eat a serving of berries or grapes.

quote.text: You have to stay calm under pressure.
quote.author: Mark Viduka

micro_action.task: Say 'Please' and 'Thank you' to the shop assistant or server.

quote.text: You have to take your chances when they come.
quote.author: Tim Cahill

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water with every snack.

quote.text: I just kept pedaling.
quote.author: Robbie McEwen

micro_action.task: Have a salad with your dinner.

quote.text: I just want to be in the flow.
quote.author: Stephanie Gilmore

micro_action.task: Write down three things you are grateful for today.

quote.text: If you're not failing, you're not growing.
quote.author: Layne Beachley

micro_action.task: Clean up your room or space today.

quote.text: We’re a team, we win and lose together.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.
